meaning: n.(瓦楞纸外层的)挂面纸板
examples: At this time, it expanded to the pulp and paper business and built a kraft pulp and linerboard mill in Toledo, Oregon.
Nine Dragons is China's largest containerboard maker and produces a wide range of high-quality packaging paperboard products such as linerboard, which is used to make corrugated cartons.
Simultaneously, the Ministry of Commerce issued questionnaires to other unbleached kraft linerboard producers in the Chinese mainland on file, soliciting their opinions on the application.
